name: Dothan Performance Golf Center
about: Dothan Performance Golf Center is a premier golf retail and training facility located off Highway 84, situated halfway between Robert Trent Jones at Highland Oaks and Dothan Country Club. The venue offers a comprehensive range of services including expert custom fitting, golf coaching, club repairs, specialized speed training, and indoor golf simulator bay rentals and memberships. With 3 indoor golf simulators, the center provides convenient access to practice and play without the hassle of waiting for bays to become available. The facility is equipped with high-end technology to support personalized fittings and expert coaching, catering to golfers of all skill levels looking to enhance their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive services including custom fitting, coaching, and club repairs
3 indoor golf simulators for flexible bay rentals and memberships
Specialized speed training programs for elite-level improvement
Convenient location between two major golf courses
Dana Dahlquist Certified Teaching Center for expert instruction

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides club rentals and repairs, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for custom fitting and personal practice.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No mention of food or drink service is available on-site; BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 3 simulators, 18-hole play typically takes 1-2 hours depending on simulator availability and pace of play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers programs suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
